title: ArenaMaker
description: Create PvP arenas for 1v1 duels and wave survival with ELO ranking, wagers, kits, and leaderboards.
body:
# ArenaMaker
### Arena, Duel & Wave Survival Plugin

Create arenas â€˘ Host duels â€˘ Survive waves â€˘ Earn rewards

---

## Features

- Arena Builder with visual particle preview
- 1v1 Duels with ELO ranking & wagers
- Wave Survival mode with shop system
- Auto-matchmaking queue
- Full GUI admin panel
- In-game shop editor
- Kit system with effects
- Player statistics & leaderboards
- Vault economy support
- WorldGuard protection

---

## Commands

<details>
<summary>Arena</summary>

- `/arena create <id>`
- `/arena delete <id>`
- `/arena setpos <id> <1|2>`
- `/arena setspawn <id> <1|2>`
- `/arena setlobby <id>`
- `/arena info <id>`
- `/arena list`
- `/arena enable|disable <id>`
- `/arena tp <id>`
- `/arena maker`
- `/arena gui`
- `/arena select <id>`
- `/arena protect <id>`
- `/arena hide`

</details>

<details>
<summary>Duel</summary>

- `/duel <player> [wager]`
- `/duel accept`
- `/duel deny`
- `/duel stats [player]`
- `/duel top`
- `/duel queue`
- `/duel leave`
- `/duel spectate <player>`

</details>

<details>
<summary>Game</summary>

- `/game create <arena>`
- `/game join <id>`
- `/game leave`
- `/game start`
- `/game shop`
- `/game points`
- `/game list`

</details>

<details>
<summary>Kit</summary>

- `/kit create <name>`
- `/kit delete <name>`
- `/kit save <name>`
- `/kit load <name>`
- `/kit list`
- `/kit seticon <name>`

</details>

<details>
<summary>Shop</summary>

- `/shop list`
- `/shop create <id>`
- `/shop delete <id>`
- `/shop info <id>`
- `/shop edit <id>`
- `/shop additem <shop> <id> [cost]`
- `/shop removeitem <shop> <id>`
- `/shop setcost <shop> <id> <cost>`
- `/shop settier <shop> <id> <tier>`
- `/shop setlimit <shop> <id> <limit>`

</details>

---

## Permissions

- `arena.admin` - Full access (op)
- `arena.use` - Duel & queue (true)
- `arena.wager` - Use wagers (true)
- `arena.spectate` - Watch matches (true)
- `arena.bypass` - Bypass limits (op)

---

## Placeholders

<details>
<summary>Stats</summary>

- `%arena_wins%`
- `%arena_losses%`
- `%arena_draws%`
- `%arena_kills%`
- `%arena_deaths%`
- `%arena_kdr%`
- `%arena_matches%`
- `%arena_winrate%`
- `%arena_streak%`
- `%arena_best_streak%`
- `%arena_elo%`
- `%arena_rank%`
- `%arena_earnings%`
- `%arena_wagered%`

</details>

<details>
<summary>Match Info</summary>

- `%arena_in_match%`
- `%arena_in_queue%`
- `%arena_queue_position%`
- `%arena_current_arena%`
- `%arena_opponent%`
- `%arena_time_left%`

</details>

<details>
<summary>Server & Leaderboard</summary>

- `%arena_active_matches%`
- `%arena_arena_count%`
- `%arena_kit_count%`
- `%arena_top_wins_1_name%`
- `%arena_top_wins_1_value%`
- `%arena_top_elo_1_name%`
- `%arena_top_streak_1_name%`
- `%arena_top_earnings_1_name%`

</details>

---

## Config Files

- `config.yml` - General settings
- `arenas.yml` - Arena data
- `kits.yml` - Kit loadouts
- `shops.yml` - Shop items
- `stats.yml` - Player stats
- `rewards.yml` - Win rewards

---

## Dependencies

- Required: None
- Optional: WorldEdit, WorldGuard, Vault, PlaceholderAPI
